questions.q: What is the capital of Australia?
questions.explanation: Canberra is Australia's capital city, purpose-built as a compromise between rival cities Sydney and Melbourne. Sydney and Melbourne are major cities but not the capital.

questions.q: Which city is the capital of Brazil?
questions.explanation: Brasília is the capital of Brazil, built in the 1960s as a planned city in the interior. Rio de Janeiro and São Paulo are more famous but are not the capital.

questions.q: What is the capital of Canada?
questions.explanation: Ottawa is Canada's capital city. Toronto is the largest city, and Vancouver and Montreal are major population centers, but Ottawa is the capital.

questions.q: Which city serves as the capital of South Africa?
questions.explanation: Pretoria is the executive capital of South Africa. South Africa has three capitals: Pretoria (executive), Cape Town (legislative), and Bloemfontein (judicial).

questions.q: What is the capital of New Zealand?
questions.explanation: Wellington is the capital of New Zealand, located at the southern tip of the North Island. Auckland is the largest city but not the capital.

questions.q: Which city is the capital of Egypt?
questions.explanation: Cairo is the capital and largest city of Egypt. Alexandria is a major Mediterranean port city but not the capital.

questions.q: What is the capital of Thailand?
questions.explanation: Bangkok is the capital and largest city of Thailand. Phuket and Pattaya are popular tourist destinations but not the capital.

questions.q: Which city is the capital of Sweden?
questions.explanation: Stockholm is the capital of Sweden, built on 14 islands. Gothenburg and Malmö are major cities but not the capital.

questions.q: What is the capital of Argentina?
questions.explanation: Buenos Aires is the capital and largest city of Argentina, known as the 'Paris of South America'. Córdoba is the second-largest city but not the capital.

questions.q: Which city is the capital of Greece?
questions.explanation: Athens is the capital of Greece and one of the world's oldest inhabited cities. Thessaloniki is the second-largest city but not the capital.
